creator: r.c.ladan@gmail.com
text:
I've cleaned up the Makefile:

* remove no-op USE_GETOPT_LONG
* implicitly depend on libgcrypt, libgpg-error, gettext, glib, and iconv via libspectrum
* don't pull in ICU
